title: July 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 28''' is the 209th day (210th in leap years) of the year, with 156 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[Alfie Curtis]] is born.
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Phil Proctor]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Drew Karpyshyn]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'' published.
*1997 – [[Electronic Arts]] acquires [[Maxis]].
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 8|''Star Wars'' (1998) 8]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Chic Stone]] dies.
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars Insider 111|''Star Wars Insider'' 111]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Invasion: Rescues 3|''Invasion: Rescues'' 3]] published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.23]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – [[Celebration Europe II]] in Essen, Germany concludes.
*[[2015]] – [[The Phantom Menace (Golden Book)|''The Phantom Menace'']] [[Golden Books|Golden Book]] published.
*2015 – [[Attack of the Clones (Golden Book)|''Attack of the Clones'']] Golden Book published.
*2015 – [[Revenge of the Sith (Golden Book)|''Revenge of the Sith'']] Golden Book published.
*2015 – [[A New Hope (Little Golden Book)|''A New Hope'']] Golden Book published.
*2015 – [[The Empire Strikes Back (Golden Book)|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] Golden Book published.
*2015 – [[Return of the Jedi (Golden Book)|''Return of the Jedi'']] Golden Book published.
*2015 – "[[Brothers (short story)|Brothers]]" published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Dark Legends]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[William Shakespeare's The Merry Rise of Skywalker: Star Wars Part the Ninth]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic (2021) 7|''The High Republic'' (2021) 7]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars (2020) 15|''Star Wars'' (2020) 15]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 7|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 7]] published.
*2021 – [[Jonathan W. Rinzler]] dies.
*[[2026]] – [[Legacy (novel)|''Legacy'']] to be published.
*2026 – [[Legacy (audiobook)|''Legacy'' audiobook]] to be released.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Tiny Book of Grogu]]'' to be reprinted.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Tiny Book of Jedi]]'' to be reprinted.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Tiny Book of Sith]]'' to be reprinted.
